> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: If this is a critical vulnerability that could be exploited by an attacker,
> **do NOT open a public issue**. Instead, email the maintainer directly or use
> GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability).

## Security Issue Description
<!-- Describe the vulnerability -->

## Affected Component
- [ ] Port scanner (Rust)
- [ ] CVE matcher (Rust)
- [ ] REST API (Go)
- [ ] Web dashboard
- [ ] Authentication / Authorization
- [ ] Dependency / supply chain

## Severity (your estimate)
- [ ] Critical — remote code execution / privilege escalation
- [ ] High — significant data exposure or system impact
- [ ] Medium — limited impact with specific conditions
- [ ] Low — minimal risk, defense-in-depth improvement

## Steps to Reproduce
<!-- How can the issue be triggered? -->

## Suggested Fix
<!-- Optional: if you have a fix in mind -->
